zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia Wyse於1459年出生在英國戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾時，她的父親Thomas Wyse30歲，母親Thomasine Fulford15歲。她於1475年與James Russell Gentleman of the Privy Chamber, Baron Russell, of Cheyneys在英國英格蘭多瑟特金斯頓 羅素結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年11月30日在英國多瑟特金斯頓 羅素享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特金斯頓 羅素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alicia Wyse于1459年出生在英国戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾时，她的父亲Thomas Wyse30岁，母亲Thomasine Fulford15岁。她于1475年与James Russell Gentleman of the Privy Chamber, Baron Russell, of Cheyneys在英国英格兰多瑟特金斯頓 羅素结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1505年11月30日在英国多瑟特金斯頓 羅素享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特金斯頓 羅素。

nameMeanings.name: Wyse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (Waterford and Cork): mainly Irish and Scottish spelling of Wise . The name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was also Gaelicized as de Uidheas.

variants.name: Wise
meanings: English: nickname for a wise or learned person, from Middle English wise, wisse ‘wise’ (Old English wīs). This name has also absorbed Dutch Wijs and De Wijs, a nickname meaning ‘(the) wise’, and possibly cognates in other languages.
English: topographic name for someone who lived by the withies or willows, from Middle English withi, Old English wīthig ‘withy, willow’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weiss   ‘white’.

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia Wyse was born in 1459, in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, her father, Thomas Wyse, was 30 and her mother, Thomasine Fulford, was 15. She married James Russell Gentleman of the Privy Chamber, Baron Russell, of Cheyneys in 1475, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 30 November 1505, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia Wyse est née en 1459, à Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wyse, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Fulford, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé James Russell Gentleman of the Privy Chamber, Baron Russell, of Cheyneys en 1475, à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 novembre 1505, à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alicia Wyse 1459 in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Wyse 30 und ihre Mutter Thomasine Fulford 15. Sie hat 1475 in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom James Russell Gentleman of the Privy Chamber, Baron Russell, of Cheyneys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. November 1505 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England und wurde in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia Wyse è nata il nel 1459 nel Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, sua padre, Thomas Wyse, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Thomasine Fulford, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato James Russell Gentleman of the Privy Chamber, Baron Russell, of Cheyneys nel 1475, nel Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 30 novembre 1505, nel Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicia Wyseが1459年にイギリスデボンシデンハム ダムレルで生まれた時，父Thomas Wyseは30歳，母Thomasine Fulfordは15歳であった。1475年にイギリスイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルでJames Russell Gentleman of the Privy Chamber, Baron Russell, of Cheyneysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1505年11月30日にイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルにて埋葬された。

ko.Bradfield Saint George, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브래드필드 스트 조지
ko.lifeSummary: Alicia Wyse(이)가 1459년 영국 데폰 시데함 다머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wyse(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomasine Fulford(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 James Russell Gentleman of the Privy Chamber, Baron Russell, of Cheyneys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 11월 30일 영국 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia Wyse nasceu em 1459, em Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wyse, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Fulford, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com James Russell Gentleman of the Privy Chamber, Baron Russell, of Cheyneys em 1475, em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1505, em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Bradfield Saint George, Suffolk, England: брадфиелд ст джеордж, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia Wyse родилась в 1459 г. в местности сиденам дэмирэл, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Wyse было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Fulford, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Russell Gentleman of the Privy Chamber, Baron Russell, of Cheyneys в 1475 г. в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 30 ноября 1505 г. в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alicia Wyse nació en 1459, en Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Wyse, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Thomasine Fulford, tenía 15 años. Se casó con James Russell Gentleman of the Privy Chamber, Baron Russell, of Cheyneys en 1475, en Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 30 de noviembre de 1505, en Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
